buildCommand: pnpm --filter @workspace/she-paradise run build || pnpm run build && rm -rf .vercel_static && mkdir -p .vercel_static && if [ -d artifacts/she-paradise/dist/public ]; then cp -R artifacts/she-paradise/dist/public/* .vercel_static/; fi && if [ -d dist/public ]; then cp -R dist/public/* .vercel_static/; fi
